search.query: * |  select  ProductCode as pro   from(select DISTINCT  ProductCode   as ProductCode  from instance_bill)

A.compareValueDescription: 昨日消费  /  同比上月

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *|  select round(diff[1],2),round(diff[2] ,2), round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from(select compare("昨日消费",2592000) as diff from(  select round(coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0),3) as "昨日消费" from instance_bill where productcode like '%%'))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *|  select round(diff[1],2),round(diff[2] ,2), round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from(select compare("昨日消费",2592000) as diff from(  select round(coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0),3) as "昨日消费" from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}'))

A.compareValueDescription: 最高日消费 / 同比上月

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *|  select  coalesce(cast( round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'无数据'),round(diff[2] ,2),round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from( select compare("最大日消费",2592000) as diff from( select round(max(this_month),2) as "最大日消费" from ( select  date_trunc('day',__time__) as day,  sum(  PretaxAmount ) as "this_month" from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day)))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *|  select  coalesce(cast( round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'无数据'),round(diff[2] ,2),round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from( select compare("最大日消费",2592000) as diff from( select round(max(this_month),2) as "最大日消费" from ( select  date_trunc('day',__time__) as day,  sum(  PretaxAmount ) as "this_month" from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day)))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then '其他' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then '其他' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: 本月每日消费及趋势预测

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |   select date_format(res.stamp,'%Y-%m-%d') as time ,res.real as "实际消费",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "预测消费",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total  from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |   select date_format(res.stamp,'%Y-%m-%d') as time ,res.real as "实际消费",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "预测消费",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total  from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期", round(sum(pretaxamount),3)  as "金额"    from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by "日期" order by "日期"
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期", round(sum(pretaxamount),3)  as "金额"    from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by "日期" order by "日期"

basicOptions.displayName: 最近3个月每日账单和增长比例

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |   select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total as "日消费（元）" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day order by day)
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |   select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total as "日消费（元）" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day order by day)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductName else '其他' end as ProductName from(select day,total,ProductName, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,ProductName from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductName from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day,ProductName order by day)))  group by day, ProductName order by day  limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductName else '其他' end as ProductName from(select day,total,ProductName, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,ProductName from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductName from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day,ProductName order by day)))  group by day, ProductName order by day  limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else '其他' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%Y-%m') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else '其他' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%Y-%m') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then '后付费' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then '预付费' when item = 'Refund' then '退款' when item = 'Adjustment' then  '调账' else item end as "付费类型" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then '后付费' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then '预付费' when item = 'Refund' then '退款' when item = 'Adjustment' then  '调账' else item end as "付费类型" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000

display.displayName: 日账单异常检测（蓝线为实际值，红线为预期值，圈点为异常点）

basicOptions.displayName: 未来三个月预测费用汇总

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%Y-%m') as t, sum(predict) as "预测费用" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%Y-%m') as t, sum(predict) as "预测费用" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000
